title: Opening Ceremony & Welcome Address
description: The official opening of BAC 2026. Welcome addresses from the ASBTEC President, the FEBIOTEC President, and a representative of the Faculty of Biosciences, UAB. Sets the tone for five days of science, networking, and professional development.

title: Keynote: Genome Editing — From Lab to Clinic
description: Dr. Maria Puig presents the latest advances in CRISPR-Cas9 therapeutics, covering the regulatory landscape, delivery challenges, and first-in-human trials. A comprehensive overview of where genome editing stands in 2026.

title: Expo BAC: Stand Visit & Networking
description: Exhibitor stands open throughout the congress. Visit company and institutional stands, pick up materials, and speak directly with recruiters and scientists from the industry.

title: Workshop: AI Tools in Drug Discovery
description: A hands-on workshop led by Dr. Marc Subirana exploring how machine learning and protein structure prediction (AlphaFold, RoseTTAFold) are reshaping early-stage drug discovery pipelines. Bring your laptop.

title: Welcome Cocktail & Social Mixer
description: Informal welcome reception on the Faculty terrace. A relaxed setting to meet fellow attendees, organisers, and speakers before the congress kicks off in earnest.

title: Talk: CAR-T Cell Therapy — Current Challenges
description: Dr. Laia Ferrer examines the clinical and manufacturing hurdles facing CAR-T therapies, including tumour microenvironment resistance, cost of goods, and scalability for solid tumours.

title: Round Table: Careers in Biotech — Industry vs. Academia
description: A panel of researchers and industry professionals discuss career trajectories, work–life balance, salaries, and the skills employers look for. Open Q&A for all attendees.

title: Roche Masterclass: Diagnostics Innovation
description: Roche Diagnostics presents their next-generation sequencing platforms and companion diagnostics pipeline. Includes a live demo of their clinical laboratory information system.

title: Science Escape Room: The Viral Outbreak
description: Team-based escape room challenge set in a fictional infectious disease scenario. Groups of 6 must apply molecular biology and epidemiology knowledge to 'stop the outbreak'. Fun, competitive, and educational.

title: Keynote: Personalised Nutrition & Metabolic Health
description: Dr. Andreu Palou delivers the second major keynote of BAC 2026. His group's research links gut microbiome composition, genetic polymorphisms, and dietary patterns to metabolic disease risk — with implications for public health.

title: Workshop: Regulatory Pathways for Biotech Products
description: Dr. Núria Vidal walks attendees through EMA and FDA regulatory strategy for advanced therapy medicinal products (ATMPs), biosimilars, and medical devices. Includes a case study of a Spanish startup's approval journey.

title: UAB Campus Guided Tour
description: A guided walk around the UAB campus, including the Faculty of Biosciences, the Institute of Biotechnology and Biomedicine, and the UAB Science Park. Held outdoors — comfortable footwear recommended.

title: Round Table: Biotech Funding & Entrepreneurship in Spain
description: Investors, startup founders, and grant specialists discuss the Spanish biotech funding landscape — from national grants (CDTI, AEI) to Series A rounds and EIC accelerator funding.

title: Talk: Synthetic Biology for Sustainable Bioproduction
description: Dr. Elena Molina describes how metabolic engineering and synthetic biology are being applied to replace petrochemical processes with biosynthetic routes, focusing on her startup's platform for bioplastics production.

title: Practical: Microbiology Lab Techniques
description: An interactive lab session introducing advanced microbiology techniques — anaerobic cultivation, 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing preparation, and confocal microscopy imaging of biofilms. Limited to 20 participants.

title: Novartis Symposium: Gene Therapy — 2026 Horizons
description: Novartis scientists present their AAV and LNP gene therapy programmes, with a focus on in-vivo delivery progress and the evolving manufacturing challenges of advancing therapies from Phase I to commercialisation.

title: Science Communication Workshop
description: Dr. Xavier Grau leads a practical session on communicating complex science to non-expert audiences. Covers media interviews, science writing, social media, and the ethics of simplification. With live exercises.

title: BAC Dinner & Awards Ceremony
description: Gala dinner for all congress participants, followed by the BAC 2026 Awards — recognising the best poster, the best oral communication, and the ASBTEC Young Biotech Award. Dress code: smart casual.

title: Talk: Environmental Microbiome & Bioremediation
description: Prof. Jordi Mas presents two decades of research on the role of microbial communities in contaminated aquifer remediation and industrial wastewater treatment, with examples from active field sites in Catalonia.

title: Round Table: The Future of Biotech in Catalonia
description: Closing round table bringing together scientists, entrepreneurs, and policy voices to discuss the outlook for Catalonia's life science sector — talent pipeline, international competitiveness, and public investment priorities.

title: Closing Ceremony & Farewell
description: Closing remarks from the ASBTEC board, announcement of the next BAC host association, and farewell to participants. Includes a brief video recap of BAC 2026 highlights.

title: Grifols Info Session: Plasma & Biosimilars
description: Grifols presents their plasma-derived medicine portfolio and biosimilars pipeline, with a focus on career opportunities in their global operations and R&D centres.

title: Poster Session I
description: Poster presentations from congress participants — Day 1 and 2 posters on display. Authors present their work and answer questions. Coffee and networking included.

title: Poster Session II
description: Poster presentations from congress participants — Day 3 and 4 posters on display. Coffee and networking included.

title: Thermo Fisher Demo: PCR & Next-Gen Sequencing
description: Live demonstration of Thermo Fisher's Applied Biosystems QuantStudio systems and their Ion Torrent Genexus integrated sequencer. Hands-on opportunity for attendees.
